task_completion.description: Open the original inspection report document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the contents of 'inspection_report.docx'.

task_completion.description: Configure Section 2 with Portrait orientation and the correct header
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page in portrait orientation is visible with the text 'ABC Engineering Associates — CONFIDENTIAL' located in the header area (above the main text body).

task_completion.description: Configure Section 3 with Landscape orientation and the correct header
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page in landscape orientation (wider than it is tall) is visible with the text 'Appendix A — Floor Plans & Deficiency Matrix' in the header area.

task_completion.description: Configure Section 4 with Landscape orientation and the correct header
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page in landscape orientation is visible with the text 'Appendix B — Cost Estimates' in the header area.

task_completion.description: Configure Section 5 with Portrait orientation and the correct header
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page in portrait orientation is visible with the text 'Appendix C — Certifications & Qualifications' in the header area.

task_completion.description: Save the restructured document with the new filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'inspection_report_formatted.docx' being saved in the Documents folder, or the word processor's window title updates to 'inspection_report_formatted.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts executing document modifications.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual header functionality of the word processor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with header menus (e.g., Insert -> Header and Footer) or clicks inside the designated header area, rather than just typing text at the very top of the normal page body.

integrity.description: The agent used page styles or setup dialogs to change page orientations
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent opens 'Page Style' or 'Page Setup' dialogs to apply landscape/portrait orientations and insert manual page breaks, rather than just resizing the application window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires restructuring a document into 5 sections with specific orientations and headers. Section 1 (Title Page) must be Portrait with no header. Section 2 must be Portrait with the header 'ABC Engineering Associates — CONFIDENTIAL'. Section 3 must be Landscape with the header 'Appendix A — Floor Plans & Deficiency Matrix'. Section 4 must be Landscape with the header 'Appendix B — Cost Estimates'. Section 5 must be Portrait with the header 'Appendix C — Certifications & Qualifications'. The final document must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Documents/inspection_report_formatted.docx.
